query: PostgreSQL cost at scale for 10TB dataset
answer: PostgreSQL can handle 10TB datasets, with costs varying based on instance type and cloud provider, such as $12k/month for a large RDS instance. Xata offers scalable PostgreSQL options starting at $0.012/hr.

results.title: Scaling PostgreSQL Beyond 10TB with Confidence - LinkedIn
results.snippet: Scaling PostgreSQL beyond 10TB doesn't have to mean sacrificing performance or reliability. As data volumes grow, many teams hit hard limits

results.title: Re: 10 TB database - PostgreSQL
results.snippet: You can certainly build a server capable of handling this job with PostgreSQL here in 2009. Get 8 cores, a stack of 24 1TB disks and a RAID card with a write

results.title: PostgreSQL Database Cost Estimation
results.snippet: Now that we know a single CPU core can only do one thing at a time, we can use this knowledge to estimate the number of CPUs we need to handle all of our estimated queries per second. $ cat simple-page-by-id.sql \set aoffset random(1, 2000000) SELECT name, description, sku, on_back_order, in_stock, image_urls, discount_codes, categories, price, weight, length, width, height, is_available FROM products WHERE id > :aoffset ORDER by id LIMIT 10; $ pgbench --client=8 --jobs=1 --time=30 --no-vacuum --file=simple-page-by-id.sql pgbench (15.6 (Debian 15.6-0+deb12u1)) transaction type: simple-page-by-id.sql scaling factor: 1 query mode: simple number of clients: 8 number of threads: 1 maximum number of tries: 1 duration: 30 s number of transactions actually processed: 1175582 number of failed transactions: 0 (0.000%) latency average = 0.204 ms initial connection time = 20.121 ms tps = 39212.065573 (without initial connection time).

results.title: Postgres RDS is too expensive - : r/devops - Reddit
results.snippet: We run a multi az rds postgres on a db.m6g.12xl instance with 10tb of storage in ap-south-1. This is costing us 12k USD per month.
